message:
fix: bd dolt remote add/list/remove operate on wrong directory (GH#2306, GH#2311)

CLI remote operations used st.Path() which returns .beads/dolt/ (server root)
instead of the actual database subdirectory .beads/dolt/{database}/. This caused
remotes to be registered in the wrong directory, making push/pull silently target
an empty root database instead of the user's actual data.

Add CLIDir() public accessor and use it in all three remote command handlers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
